name: ExtensionAttachment_Duration
title: R5: Length in seconds (audio / video) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Attachment.duration` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Attachment.duration` 0..1 `decimal`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Attachment.duration` 0..1 `decimal`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Attachment.duration` has a context of Attachment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Attachment`.
Element `Attachment.duration` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Attachment.duration` has a context of Attachment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Attachment`.
Element `Attachment.duration` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The duration might differ from occurrencePeriod if recording was paused.

element.definition: The duration of the recording in seconds - for audio and video.
element.comment: The duration might differ from occurrencePeriod if recording was paused.
